sql_array: CREATE TABLE html_test (id Int32, html_content String, nullable_content Nullable(String));
INSERT INTO html_test (id, html_content, nullable_content) VALUES (1, '>example<', NULL), (2, '❤Love❤', 'Some text');
SELECT id, decodeHTMLComponent(html_content) AS decoded_html FROM html_test WHERE decoded_html IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, decodeHTMLComponent(nullable_content) AS decoded_content FROM html_test WHERE decoded_content IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, decodeHTMLComponent(NULLIF(html_content, '')) AS decoded_non_empty FROM html_test WHERE decoded_non_empty IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, t2.decoded_html FROM (SELECT id, decodeHTMLComponent(html_content) AS decoded_html FROM html_test) AS t2 WHERE t2.decoded_html IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT decodeHTMLComponent(html_content) AS decoded_html FROM html_test WHERE html_content IS NOT NULL) AS inner_query GROUP BY decoded_html HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
CREATE TABLE null_test (id Int32, value Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO null_test (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 5), (3, NULL), (4, 10);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM null_test WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, decodeHTMLComponent('Test > for NULL') AS test_html, value IS NOT NULL AS value_check FROM null_test;
SELECT id FROM null_test WHERE value IS NULL HAVING value_check = 0;
SELECT DISTINCT decodeHTMLComponent(NULLIF(value, NULL)) FROM null_test WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE complex_test (id Int32, description String);
INSERT INTO complex_test (id, description) VALUES (1, 'Hello <b>World</b>'), (2, 'ClickHouse ♥ is Cool!');
SELECT id, decodeHTMLComponent(description) AS clean_description FROM complex_test WHERE clean_description IS NOT NULL ORDER BY clean_description;
SELECT c.id, d.decoded_description FROM complex_test AS c JOIN (SELECT id, decodeHTMLComponent(description) AS decoded_description FROM complex_test) AS d ON c.id = d.id WHERE c.id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT c.id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complex_test WHERE id IS NOT NULL) AS total, decodeHTMLComponent(c.description) AS clean_description FROM complex_test AS c WHERE total > 1;
SELECT id, decodeHTMLComponent(description) AS decoded_desc FROM complex_test WHERE decoded_desc IS NOT NULL HAVING decoded_desc IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE type_test (id Int32, numeric_value Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO type_test (id, numeric_value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 3), (3, 0), (4, 10000);
SELECT id, decodeHTMLComponent(CAST(numeric_value AS String)) AS numeric_as_string FROM type_test WHERE numeric_as_string IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, decodeHTMLComponent(CAST(value AS String)) FROM type_test WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND value > -1) AS valid_numbers WHERE id IS NOT NULL;
